title: SPAIN enforcement action against ORNITOLÓGICA DE ANDALUCÍA FOA (900)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 900 on ORNITOLÓGICA DE ANDALUCÍA FOA. The controller sent a mass email to more than 200 affiliated recipients. The email disclosed personal data that was not necessary for the intended purpose, due to insufficient technical and organisational...
